title: BEM-840 cost guard
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 17:56 (UTC+3)'
# Pause workflow dispatch queue items to stop automatic fan-out while preserving evidence.
queue_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
paused_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused')
paused=[]
for p in sorted(queue_dir.glob('*.json')):
    target=paused_dir/(p.name+'.paused')
    target.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore')+sep+'--- paused_at ---'+sep+created+sep)
    p.unlink()
    paused.append({'from':str(p),'to':str(target)})
# Disable processor fan-out by state flag consumed by hardened processor.
flag=Path('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.json')
flag.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_pause.v1','status':'paused','reason':'Runaway GitHub Actions usage guard after repeated Codex/dispatch loop','paused_at':created,'resume_requires':'explicit operator resume command and single smoke plan'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Patch processor to respect pause flag and exit cleanly.
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
if proc.exists():
    txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
    guard='''\nif [ -f governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.json ]; then\n  mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state\n  now="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"\n  printf '{"status":"queue_paused","time":"%s","reason":"runaway_cost_guard"}\\n' "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_paused.status.json\n  printf '{"status":"processor_paused","time":"%s"}\\n' "$now" > governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json\n  echo "workflow_dispatch_queue_paused"\n  exit 0\nfi\n'''
    if 'workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.json' not in txt:
        txt=txt.replace('set -euo pipefail\n', 'set -euo pipefail\n'+guard, 1)
        proc.write_text(txt)
# Create clear policy note.
policy=Path('governance/protocols/BEM840_RUNAWAY_COST_GUARD.md')
policy.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
policy.write_text('# BEM-840 | Runaway Cost Guard'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Причина: GitHub metered usage вырос из-за избыточных Codex Runner / workflow_dispatch циклов.'+sep+sep+'Правило: пока включён флаг governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.json, очередь workflow_dispatch не запускает новые fan-out workflows.'+sep+sep+'Resume допускается только одной короткой smoke-задачей: 1 fix, 1 tick, 1 verify. Без длинных repair-loop.'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'runaway_cost_guard_installed','paused_queue_items':paused,'pause_flag':str(flag),'processor_patched':proc.exists(),'policy':str(policy),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_install_runaway_cost_guard.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_install_runaway_cost_guard.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Install Runaway Cost Guard | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: verify queue pause result and then prepare a one-shot repair plan. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: runaway_cost_guard_installed'+sep+'Next: verify queue pause, then one-shot repair plan only.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.json','governance/protocols/BEM840_RUNAWAY_COST_GUARD.md','governance/state/bem840_install_runaway_cost_guard.json','governance/reports/bem840_install_runaway_cost_guard.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if proc.exists(): changed.append(str(proc))
changed.extend([x['to'] for x in paused])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Installed runaway cost guard: paused workflow dispatch queue items, added pause flag, patched processor to respect pause, and documented one-shot resume policy')
"""
No issue comments.
